description: From the grill to your plate — authentic flavors, bold spices, and food that feeds the soul.

items.name: Jerk Chicken
items.description: Slow-marinated in our signature jerk spice blend, chargrilled to perfection. Served with rice and peas.

items.name: Smoked Brisket
items.description: 12-hour oak-smoked beef brisket, hand-sliced thick. Topped with house-made BBQ glaze.

items.name: Blackened Catfish
items.description: Wild-caught catfish dusted in Cajun spices, pan-seared crispy. Served with tartar and slaw.

items.name: Oxtail Stew
items.description: Braised oxtail in a rich, savory gravy with butter beans. A soul food classic done right.

items.name: Mac & Cheese
items.description: Five-cheese blend, baked golden with a crispy breadcrumb crust.

items.name: Collard Greens
items.description: Slow-simmered with smoked turkey and a touch of vinegar heat.

items.name: Cornbread
items.description: Sweet honey-butter cornbread, baked fresh every hour.

items.name: Fried Plantains
items.description: Ripe plantains fried golden, sprinkled with sea salt.

items.name: Fresh Lemonade
items.description: Hand-squeezed lemonade with a hint of mint. Ice cold.

items.name: Sweet Tea
items.description: Southern-style sweet tea brewed daily. The real deal.

items.name: Ginger Beer
items.description: Spicy house-brewed ginger beer with lime. Bold and refreshing.

specials.name: The Flame Platter
specials.description: Our signature combo: jerk chicken, smoked brisket, mac & cheese, collard greens, and cornbread. Feeds the whole soul.

specials.name: Sunday Oxtail Special
specials.description: Braised oxtail over rice and peas with fried plantains and a side of our famous pepper sauce.

specials.name: Catfish & Grits
specials.description: Blackened catfish over creamy stone-ground grits with roasted tomato relish and a drizzle of hot honey.
